Phase-46.NAME: User Cabinet Password and MTProto Link UX Polish
Phase-46.purpose: Polish registration password guidance and user-cabinet MTProto link/status UX before the next clean-deploy validation.

scope.in: Password example display, MTProto tg:// vs https://t.me link separation, Russian MTProto labels, dynamic MTProto status badge refresh, frontend smoke verification, and MyGRACE metadata.
scope.out: Deploy/install scripts, backend MTProto provisioning/runtime, database schema, VPN billing/trial semantics, admin panel MTProto analytics, and email provider behavior.

steps.step-1: Add a safe registration password example that matches the existing password policy and does not weaken backend validation.
steps.step-2: Split MTProto owner link construction into Telegram app tg://proxy and browser https://t.me/proxy variants.
steps.step-3: Change visible MTProto card labels to Russian: Ссылка, Сервер, Порт, and Секрет.
steps.step-4: Verify or add bounded dynamic refresh for the MTProto status badge in the user cabinet.
steps.step-5: Add Phase-46 static smoke coverage for password example, dual links, Russian labels, status refresh, and protected deploy/install surfaces.
steps.step-6: Update changed MODULE_MAP and CHANGE_SUMMARY blocks in touched frontend files during execution.
steps.step-7: Run frontend build, Phase-46 smoke, MyGRACE lint, XML parse, and deploy/install diff guard.

data-flow.flow-1: Register form -> passwordPolicy helper -> safe example and policy hint -> existing frontend/backend password validation.
data-flow.flow-2: MTProto owner API payload -> Dashboard link builders -> Telegram button tg://proxy and Ссылка browser/copy https://t.me/proxy.
data-flow.flow-3: MTProto owner API payload -> bounded refetch -> mtprotoStatusClass -> dynamic dashboard status badge.

mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-1: New user opens registration, sees requirements plus an example format, submits a strong custom password, and backend policy remains unchanged.
mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-2: Verified user opens dashboard, taps Telegram to launch the app link, or copies Ссылка for browser/manual sharing without mixing link schemes.
mental-walkthroughs.walkthrough-3: MTProto status changes from pending/degraded to activated and the badge updates after bounded refetch without a page reload.

phase-gates.gate-1: Password example is visible and matches policy without becoming a default password recommendation.
phase-gates.gate-2: Telegram button uses tg://proxy and browser/copy link uses https://t.me/proxy.
phase-gates.gate-3: Visible MTProto labels are localized and compact on mobile.
phase-gates.gate-4: Status badge uses current API state and has bounded auto-refresh if needed.

risks.risk-1: tg:// links depend on Telegram app availability; https://t.me link remains the browser fallback.
risks.risk-2: Password example may be copied literally; UI copy must frame it as format-only.
risks.risk-3: Overly frequent status polling can add backend load; refresh must be bounded.
risks.risk-4: MTProto secret-bearing links must remain owner-only and must not be logged by smoke tests or console traces.

commands.command: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-46.xml docs/modules/M-064.xml docs/verification/V-M-064.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml
